summary: Enhanced Daily Inventory Management System testing completed. Backend APIs 100% pass (11/11 tests). Frontend Inventory sub-tab verified in ProjectDetail view - Entry History table works, but Current Stock Levels dashboard not showing due to missing initial data fetch.

integration_issues.issue: Current Stock Levels dashboard (summary cards + stock table) not showing in Materials > Inventory sub-tab. The invDashboard state is not being fetched on initial page load - it's only fetched in fetchWorkOrderData() which is called for Work Orders tab actions, not when Materials tab loads.

action_items: Fix ProjectDetail.jsx: Add invDashboard fetch to initial fetchData() function or create a useEffect that fetches dashboard when Materials tab is active
The inventory dashboard API works correctly (verified via backend tests), but frontend doesn't fetch it on initial load
critical_code_review_comments: Backend inventory endpoints (POST, GET latest, GET dashboard, PATCH threshold) all working correctly
Low stock detection logic verified: is_low_stock = current_stock <= min_threshold when threshold > 0
ProjectDetail.jsx line 556-567: Initial fetchData() fetches materialInventory but NOT invDashboard
ProjectDetail.jsx line 1054-1068: fetchWorkOrderData() fetches invDashboard but is only called for Work Orders actions
SiteEngineerProject.jsx correctly fetches inventoryDashboard in fetchStockData() when stock_register tab is active
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed inventory entries for proj_12f23331b542 during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inventory backend APIs fully tested and working. Frontend issue: ProjectDetail.jsx needs to fetch invDashboard on initial load or when Materials tab is active. SiteEngineerProject.jsx inventory tab could not be tested directly (site engineer not assigned to test project). The inventory dashboard shows summary cards (Materials Tracked, In Stock, Low Stock Alerts) and Current Stock Levels table with editable thresholds.

POST /api/material-inventory.details: Creates inventory entry with min_threshold field, auto-calculates closing_stock

GET /api/material-inventory/latest.details: Returns latest stock per material in project

GET /api/material-inventory/dashboard.details: Returns total_materials, low_stock_count, materials array with current_stock, total_received, total_used, min_threshold, is_low_stock

PATCH /api/material-inventory/threshold.details: Updates min_threshold for material, validates required params (project_id, material_name)

Low stock detection.details: is_low_stock = true when current_stock <= min_threshold AND threshold > 0

ProjectDetail Materials > Inventory sub-.details: Entry History table shows correctly with Date, Material, Opening, Received, Used, Closing, Notes columns. Stock Entry button visible. BUT Current Stock Levels dashboard not showing.

SiteEngineerProject Inventory tab.details: Could not access - admin gets 403, site engineer not assigned to test project

verified_features.backend_inventory_crud: POST creates entry with min_threshold, closing_stock auto-calculated
verified_features.backend_latest_stock: GET /latest returns latest stock per material
verified_features.backend_dashboard: GET /dashboard returns comprehensive data with low stock alerts
verified_features.frontend_inventory_subtab: Materials > Inventory sub-tab exists in ProjectDetail
verified_features.frontend_entry_history: Entry History table shows inventory entries

rca_of_issue: ProjectDetail.jsx invDashboard not showing: The invDashboard state is initialized as null and only populated in fetchWorkOrderData() function (line 1061). This function is called when work order actions happen, not on initial page load. The initial fetchData() function (line 556-567) fetches materialInventory but not invDashboard. Fix: Add invDashboard fetch to initial load or create useEffect for Materials tab.
